raw_consumer_statement:
I have excellent credit history and pay my bills on time. Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX Acct is charging me {$1600.00} for tickets ( plus late fees ) for a charge from XXXX I have disputed multiple times. The original disputed charge was {$1400.00}. This charge was for a roundtrip flight from XXXX, OR to XXXX, MN plus 2 free vouchers and a promised refund I never received. 
I tried to contact XXXX regarding this charge, but I was hung up on when I asked to speak with the person who had charged me for an airline flight I never took and promised 2 free vouchers for additional flights I never received. XXXX XXXX posed as a XXXX XXXX agent. When I hadn't received my booking info the night before my flight, I called the real XXXX XXXX to ensure I had a ticket prior to my upcoming flight, the agent said I was not listed as a passenger and there were no more seats available on that flight. He also said this was a common scam. I then booked a different flight with XXXX for {$650.00} which I did take. I saw on my CITI XXXX statement that 2 other flights of people I do not know were charged to my CITI account on the same date, an XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX. CITI removed those charges, but did not remove the charge from XXXX for services I did not receive despite multiple calls and discussions with CITI dispute representatives who told me dont worry about it, they would take care of it. 

I sent a complaint to XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX and filed a dispute with the 3 credit reporting agencies. I filed a fraud alert against XXXX XXXX with the FTC today. XXXX XXXX is shown on my transaction on my CITI card for {$1400.00}.
